title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a Marketplace Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!
